description: When an integration connects, your agent builds a complete intelligence picture of how the platform actually behaves — community research, live verification, behavioral analysis — then creates a practical guide, pre-populates known quirks, and wires everything into the brain so it surfaces at the right moment in every future conversation.

installs.manual-merge-note: Merge the contents of behavior-snippet.md into the session routines section of /agent/user.md, after the existing session-open routine. The sentinel comments mark the block boundaries.

changelog.notes: Community intelligence sweep and live spot-check added to onboarding. Behavioral detective work and practical-guide.md added to activation. Quirks pre-populated from community research before first use.
Initial release. Three-stage connection flow (onboarding + activation + context sweep), CLI factory with quirks and usage feedback, three-layer retrieval model, never-twice quirks guarantee.
